author: anon-581fd578
content:
Three bugs:
1. DOUBLE TEXT: The glyph bearing patch in submit_frame shifts glyph positions incorrectly — cosmic-text glyph.x/y are already correct pen positions, adding bitmap bearing creates a ghost/echo effect. Fix: revert bearing pos offset, keep only UV patching.
2. INTERACTIVE STATE: build_widget_tree creates a new scope every frame, destroying all signals. Interactive elements (counter, checkbox, etc.) reset each frame. Fix: persistent signal helper using thread_local keyed cache.
3. STYLE PAGE: Needs visual richness with color swatches, etc.
